description: Big Fish mayor send-off speech, extracted from the canonical page 34/35 window, to check whether Final Draft splits after 'go.' or keeps more text above the page break.

expected.bottom_fragment_starts_with: But take with you this Key

final_draft_notes: Question: in Final Draft, does the split happen after 'go.' with '(MORE)' at the bottom, or does Final Draft keep more of the sentence on page 1?
Answer: Yes, split after go with MORE.
